name: edge-case-ephemeral-migration
task: There's a bug where switching conversations loses the DuckDB session data. When a user starts a new chat, queries some data, then the conversation gets an ID assigned, the migration from ephemeral to on-disk seems to drop some tables. Debug and fix the migrateEphemeralToConversation function.
assertions: The fix is applied in electron/core/duckdb.ts where migrateEphemeralToConversation() is defined
The migration logic exports ALL session_* tables (not a hardcoded subset) — either by querying information_schema or iterating a complete table list
The migration handles schema differences between ephemeral and on-disk tables (e.g., missing columns are handled gracefully)
The migration is not called twice for the same conversation (guard against duplicate migration)
The ephemeral database is closed after successful migration to the on-disk file
